steps.title: Identify the goal
steps.content: The student must provide an EXAMPLE of a specific dinosaur fossil specimen's nickname—not just discuss that nicknames exist in general.

steps.title: Find the choice with the specific example
steps.content:
C names the specific example: “Roberta” is the nickname of a Brachylophosaurus specimen.

The other three don't provide a named example—
  • A hints at a specimen without naming its nickname
  • B discusses nicknames only generally
  • D omits nicknames entirely
.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
